title: Section 194
content: All payments due from 1[2[the Corporation]] for interest on and repayment of loans shall be made in priority to all other payments due from 1[2[the Corporation]].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
